items.title: Foundry Fuzzing vs Invariant Testing: When Each One Finds the Bug
items.description: Foundry gives you two automated testing tools that sound similar and find very different bugs: property fuzzing and invariant testing. items.title: How I cut AI token usage by 40% with a pre-filter step
items.description:
When I built ReleaseHub - a CLI that generates release notes from merged PRs - every PR went to the AI. Feature, bugfix, dependency bump, CI fix. All of them.

items.title: translateZ()
items.description: The translateZ() function moves an element closer to or farther from the user. translateZ() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

items.title: translateY()
